name: Fried Fish Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Mix the dissolved yeast with all other ingredients until combined.
3. Allow the mixture to stand at room temperature for two hours before preparing to use it.
4. Ensure fish fillets are dry so that the batter adheres properly.
5. Heat oil or fat to 375°F (190°C).
6. Fry the fish fillets until they are crispy and golden brown.
7. This batter can also be used for Beer Batter Shrimp. Store leftover batter in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to three weeks.
